app.name: Lyd
app.storage.memory: Heads up: this browser can't keep things after you close the tab (no OPFS). Your stuff lives only for this session.
home.record.title: Listen to a song
home.record.subtitle: record or import — see its chords
home.tuner.title: Tune up
home.tuner.subtitle: guitar, bass, or any old sound
home.metronome.title: Keep time
home.metronome.subtitle: steady, swung, or delightfully odd
home.doodler.title: Hum a melody
home.doodler.subtitle: watch it turn into notes
home.library.title: Your shelf
home.library.subtitle: recordings, doodles, and scribbles
home.grimoire.title: Cast a spell
home.grimoire.subtitle: transform your tunes with magic
home.palette.title: Chord moods
home.palette.subtitle: play feelings, not names
home.phrasebook.title: Phrasebook
home.phrasebook.subtitle: the feelings have names
home.goals.title: Little quests
home.goals.subtitle: where do you want to wander?
home.garden.title: Your garden
home.garden.subtitle: watch your noise grow
record.title: Listen to a song
record.micDenied: I need the microphone to listen. You can also import a file instead.
record.tooShort: That was a bit too short to make sense of — try a few seconds more.
record.error: Hmm, I couldn't read that one. Try a wav, mp3, or m4a file.
tuner.title: Tune up
tuner.micDenied: The tuner needs the microphone to hear you.
metronome.title: Keep time
doodler.title: Hum a melody
doodler.hint: hum, whistle, or la-la-la — I'll write it down
doodler.empty: I didn't catch a melody there — try humming a little louder and steadier.
doodler.snapHint: tidy it up? (your call — the loose version is just as real)
doodler.micDenied: I need the microphone to hear your melody.
library.title: Your shelf
library.empty.recordings: No recordings yet — go listen to a song!
library.empty.doodles: No doodles yet — go hum something!
library.empty.journal: Nothing here yet. After you play, jot a line about how it felt.
library.deleteConfirm: Really delete this? It can't be undone.
results.tapHint: curious about a chord? tap it
phrasebook.title: Phrasebook
phrasebook.hint: every card is a feeling you've already had — now it gets a name
palette.title: Chord moods
palette.hint: tap a feeling to hear it — names are optional
grimoire.title: The Grimoire
grimoire.hint: spells transform your tunes — hear first, understand after
grimoire.sealedHint: meet “{{concept}}” in the wild to unseal
grimoire.fizzle: 💨 fzzt — that spell fizzled. Nothing happened, nothing broke.
scribe.title: Spell Scribe
scribe.hint: stack blocks, make magic — there are no wrong spells
scribe.needNameAndOps: give it a name and at least one block
scribe.defaultReveal: You built this transformation yourself — tap the concepts to see what it touches.
goals.title: Little quests
goals.hint: experience-shaped, guilt-free — done when it's done
goals.empty: No quests yet. Pick one, or wander freely — that counts too.
goals.template.learnChords: Learn the 3 chords in a song I love
goals.template.quietSong: Find a song that sounds like rain
garden.title: Your garden
garden.hint: everything you make plants something — nothing ever wilts
garden.empty: The soil is ready. Record, hum, or learn something and watch this grow.
profiles.title: Who's playing?
profiles.hint: kid profiles are the safe default — big buttons, no clutter, nothing leaves the device
profiles.pinHint: 4–8 digits. This locks the adult profile so kids stay in kid mode.
profiles.gateHint: enter the PIN to switch to this profile
